Package.Name: GetDataFunction
Package.Label: Module path for Get Data function (leave empty - consumer only process)

Package.Name: ProcessDataFunction
Package.Label: Module function for processing each client entry from the queue

Package.Name: EndofProcessFunction
Package.Label: Module function for end of process summary email

Package.Name: UseRobotDataQueue
Package.Label: Use IAA Robot Data Queue as transaction source

Package.Name: RetryAttempts
Package.Label: Number of retry attempts for system exceptions

Package.Name: BusinessExceptionRetry
Package.Label: Retry transaction on Business Exception

Package.Name: LogLevel
Package.Label: Log level

Package.Name: InitApplicationsFunction
Package.Label: Module function for initialising applications (browser, email templates)

Package.Name: CloseAllProcessFunction
Package.Label: Module function for gracefully closing applications

Package.Name: KillAllProcessFunction
Package.Label: Module function for force-killing applications

Package.Name: UseLocalTransactionsList
Package.Label: Use local transactions list instead of queue

Package.Name: UseCustomDataQueueFunction
Package.Label: Use custom data queue function

Package.Name: TransactionLogFile
Package.Label: Transaction log file path

Package.Name: ProcessLogFolder
Package.Label: Process log folder path

Package.Name: ExceptionScreenshotsFolderPath
Package.Label: Local folder path to save browser screenshots captured on system or business exceptions

Package.Name: EnableProcessKill
Package.Label: Force-kill ORPHANED processes by name (e.g chromedriver/chrome, EXCEL.EXE etc)

Package.Name: WorkingDirectoryXero
Package.Label: Directory to save downloaded Xero reports and a consolidated spreadsheet

Package.Name: UseExistingChromeProfile
Package.Label: If 'true', use the current user's profile; otherwise use a clean profile

Package.Name: ChromeProfileDirectory
Package.Label: Sets the profile directory. By default sets 'Default'

Package.Name: BrowserHeadless
Package.Label: If 'true', do not show the browser on the screen; otherwise - show

Package.Name: XeroLoginUrl
Package.Label: Xero login URL

Package.Name: XeroPayrollUrl
Package.Label: Xero payroll URL
